items.a: Standard shipping is free on orders over $99 within the continental US. Smaller orders ship for a flat $9.99. White-glove delivery (in-home placement + packaging removal) is available on larger items for $149.
Smaller accents typically arrive in 3–5 business days. Upholstered pieces and beds ship in 7–14 business days. Each product page shows an estimated lead time.
Yes — we ship to Canada, the UK, and most EU countries. International shipping cost and delivery time are calculated at checkout.
We offer a 30-day no-hassle return policy on most items. Mattresses come with a 100-night home trial. Custom orders are final sale.

items.q: Do your products come with a warranty?
items.a: Yes. Most furniture comes with a 5-year structural warranty. Heritage pieces include a 10- or 15-year warranty. Warranty details are listed on each product page.

items.q: What if my item arrives damaged?
items.a: Report damage within 7 days with photos, and we'll arrange a free replacement or full refund — whichever you prefer.

items.q: Do you offer a free design consultation?
items.a: Yes. Book a complimentary 30-minute video consultation with one of our in-house designers. They'll help you pick pieces that fit your space, style, and budget.

items.q: Can I customize upholstery colors or materials?
items.a: Many upholstered pieces offer fabric and leather customization. Look for the 'Customize' option on the product page. Lead times are 6–8 weeks for custom orders.
Yes — interior designers, architects, and stagers can apply for our Trade Program for preferred pricing and dedicated support.

items.q: Where do you source your materials?
items.a: We work only with FSC-certified wood suppliers, LWG-certified leather tanneries, and OEKO-TEX certified fabrics. Each product page lists its sustainability credentials.

items.q: Do you take back old furniture?
items.a: Yes — our 'Second Life' program picks up your old furniture when we deliver your new one, and donates or responsibly recycles it. Available in select cities.
